name: S1E8 心甘情愿的笼
desc: 陷阱猎人版 · 素笼特辑 · 题干小词与答题心态 24 题（词汇 6 + 语法 14 + 综合 4）

m5.q: Look! The white fox ___ in the garden.
m5.why: Look! 是现在进行时的信号词→is dancing；dances/dance 是一般现在，danced 是过去，都对不上眼前正在发生。

m5.q: There ___ some milk and two apples on the table.
m5.why: there be 就近原则，看最近的 milk（不可数）→ is；have/has 不用于 there be 句型。

m5.q: I need ___ useful map and ___ hour to walk through the garden.
m5.why: 冠词看读音：useful 以辅音音 /j/ 开头→a；hour 的 h 不发音、元音开头→an。

m5.q: — Whose mask is this? — It must be ___.
m5.why: 答语后无名词，要用名词性物主代词 hers；her/my/their 是形容词性物主代词，后面必须接名词。

m5.q: The snake with his two masks ___ on the wall every evening.
m5.why: 主语是 The snake（单数），with his two masks 只是修饰不影响谓语→sits；被 masks 带歪选复数正是陷阱。

m5.q: There are five ___ and two foxes in the garden.
m5.why: sheep 单复数同形，复数仍是 sheep；sheeps/sheepes 是杜撰，a sheep 是单数。

m5.q: The fox ___ home until the fight ended last night.
m5.why: last night 锁一般过去，否定用 didn't go；not until 的否定要放助动词上，went not 语序错。

m5.q: — How ___ is it from the school to the garden? — About ten minutes' walk.
m5.why: 问 from...to... 的距离用 how far；答语是路程→far；how long 问时长，how often 问频率。

m5.q: Mr. Wolf told us the sun ___ in the east.
m5.why: 客观真理（太阳东升）即使在过去时主句后也用一般现在 rises；raise 是及物动词“举起”，用错词。

m5.q: — ___ do you visit the old garden? — Once a month.
m5.why: 答语 once a month 表频率→How often；how long 问时长，how soon 问多久之后。

m5.q: Nobody knew ___ at that time.
m5.why: 宾语从句用陈述语序、且主句 knew（过去）→从句呼应用 lived；带 does/did 的是疑问语序，错。

m5.q: Neither the foxes nor the snake ___ afraid of the dark now.
m5.why: neither...nor 就近原则看 the snake（单数）→is；被 foxes 带去选 are 是陷阱。

m5.q: My shoes are too old. I need to buy a new ___.
m5.why: shoes 成双，买一双新的用 a new pair；one/ones 指代单只或多只都不合“一双”，shoes 与 a new 冲突。

m5.q: ___ of the students ___ the story of the white fox.
m5.why: 分数分子大于一，分母用复数→two thirds；of the students（复数）作主语，谓语用 know。

m5.q: — Must I hand in the notebook now? — No, you ___.
m5.why: 对 Must I...? 的否定回答固定用 needn't（不必）；mustn't 是“禁止”，意思相反。

m5.q: The little fox is ___ young ___ beat the queen.
m5.why: too...to do＝太…以致不能…（太小打不过）；so...that 后接从句不接 to do，very 不与 to 搭配此结构。

m5.q: — I'm sorry I lost your notebook. — ___.
m5.why: 回应别人道歉用 It doesn't matter（没关系）；You're welcome 回应感谢，场景不符。

m5.q: The white fox is ___ of the two fighters.
m5.why: of the two（两者之中）固定用 the+比较级→the braver；最高级 the bravest 用于三者及以上。

m5.q: The number of the books ___ small, but a number of them ___ interesting.
m5.why: the number of（…的数量）作主语谓语用单数 is；a number of（许多）后接复数、谓语用复数 are。

m5.q: The fox will challenge the queen again if it ___ tomorrow.
m5.why: if 引导条件状语从句“主将从现”：主句 will challenge，从句用一般现在 doesn't rain；反射填 won't rain 是陷阱。

m5.q: — Could you please tell me the way to the garden? — ___.
m5.why: Could you...? 是礼貌请求，答应用 Sure, of course；这里 could 不表过去，不能机械答 Yes, I could。

m5.q: It's very brave ___ the fox to say no, but it's hard ___ her to win.
m5.why: brave 是评价人品格的形容词→of the fox；hard 评价事情难易→for her；两者搭配相反正是考点。

m5.q: I found the test easy, but I made several ___ mistakes.
m5.why: 修饰名词 mistakes 要用形容词，且语境是“粗心的”错误→careless；carefully/carelessly 是副词不能修饰名词。

m5.q: ___ exciting news it is!
m5.why: news 是不可数名词，感叹句 What+不可数名词不加冠词→What exciting news；What a/an 用于可数单数，How 后接形容词/副词。
